variants: Mona Ashef is an accomplished professional currently employed at Kaleidoscope Curation. She graduated from Twilight Hills Conservatory, where she developed her passion for the arts. In addition to her work, she serves as the Host of Periwinkle Creek Symposium, a role that allows her to engage with the community. Mona is known for her expertise in Welsh orthography, a skill that informs her contributions to the arts. Her literary works have been published by Antler & Briar Editions, showcasing her talents to a wider audience.
